card_text:
Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools is a comparative catalog entry for Google.

Weekly tokens: 11B.
Context Window: 1,048,576 tokens.
Released: 2026-02-25.
Pricing: $2 per 1M input tokens and $12 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, multimodal, vision, reasoning, coding, agentic, function calling, long context.
